subcodes.first_line: Say: The Bird of Immortality hath soared unto the celestial dominion of the Most High. Say: The breeze of Paradise hath returned unto the city [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل ان طیر البقا قد طار الی جبروت العالین قل ان نسیم الرضوان قد رجع الی مدینه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @business; financial; property matters, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @martyrs and martyrdom
